# Helpdesk Ticket Mail Message

% !!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!
% !! This file is generated by oca-gen-addon-readme !!
% !! changes will be overwritten.                   !!
% !!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!
% !! source digest: sha256:fa88a5911e9d75e4ccaee78931e61a91ccfe34e0de09254e0edd30ad0752f428
% !!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!!

{{ badge1 }} {{ badge2 }}

Allows sending an email from the ticket form view. The module adds a new
tab where the email communications and notes associated with the ticket
are recorded have been added. With the ability to create new notes,
reply to a note, reply to an email with or without the emails in CC.

Customization of colors depending on the type of communication:

-Black: Incoming message

-Green: Internal note

-Red: Outgoing message

Email sending goes through a new custom view for the helpdesk.ticket
model. Templates are allowed, available in the email composition wizard
depending on the tags assigned with the ticket.

**Table of contents**

```{contents}
:local: true
```

## Configuration

No configuration needed for this module.

## Usage

In the model helpdesk.ticket (menu: Helpdesk-tickets) you have the
customization of the email page, where is it possible to:

- Create new notes
- Reply to a note
- Reply to an email with or without the emails in CC

In the model mail.template (menu: Settings - Technical - Templates) if
the template is related to helpdesk.ticket model, it can be related to
helpdesk ticket tags in the Advanced Settings tab of the form view.

## Known issues / Roadmap

This module introduces a mail composition wizard for the helpdesk.ticket
model and some related logics.

## Bug Tracker

Bugs are tracked on [GitLab Issues](https://gitlab.com/somitcoop/erp-research/odoo-helpdesk/-/issues). In
case of trouble, please check there if your issue has already been
reported. If you spotted it first, help us smashing it by providing a
detailed and welcomed feedback.

Do not contact contributors directly about support or help with
technical issues.

methods.name: odoo.addons.helpdesk_ticket_mail_message.wizard.mail_compose_message.MailComposeMessage.onchange_template_id_wrapper
documentation:
Prevent onchange from messing with defaults when the template is set from
the mass mailing wizard in the helpdesk ticket form view

methods.name: odoo.addons.helpdesk_ticket_mail_message.wizard.mail_compose_message.MailComposeMessage.generate_email_for_composer
documentation:
Override (for helpdesk tickets only) to avoid the email composer to suggest
addresses based on ticket partners, since it was causing duplicates for gmail
accounts. (See also helpdesk_automatic_stage_changes/models/helpdesk_ticket.py)

methods.name: odoo.addons.helpdesk_ticket_mail_message.wizard.mail_compose_message.MailComposeMessage.onchange_template_id
documentation: Do not overwrite subject and body html values

methods.name: odoo.addons.helpdesk_ticket_mail_message.models.helpdesk_ticket.HelpdeskTicket.mail_compose_message_action
documentation: Open new communication sales according to requirements

methods.name: odoo.addons.helpdesk_ticket_mail_message.models.helpdesk_ticket.HelpdeskTicket.mail_compose_message_action_note
documentation: Open new communication sales according to requirements

methods.name: odoo.addons.helpdesk_ticket_mail_message.models.helpdesk_ticket.HelpdeskTicket.message_get_default_recipients
documentation:
Override for helpdesk tickets (as in crm.lead) to avoid the email composer
to suggest addresses based on ticket partners, since it was causing duplicates
for gmail accounts.

classes.name: odoo.addons.helpdesk_ticket_mail_message.models.mail_message.Message

methods.name: odoo.addons.helpdesk_ticket_mail_message.models.mail_message.Message.create
documentation:
When creating a new message, color it depending of its type
(sent, recieved, note) and update its ticket if it is related to one

methods.name: odoo.addons.helpdesk_ticket_mail_message.models.mail_message.Message._prepare_action_mail_compose_with_context
documentation:
Prepare action mail_compose_message for tickets with context,
depending on the composition_mode and other parameters

methods.name: odoo.addons.helpdesk_ticket_mail_message.models.mail_message.Message.mail_compose_message_action
documentation: Open new communication to send mail

methods.name: odoo.addons.helpdesk_ticket_mail_message.models.mail_message.Message.mail_compose_message_action_all
documentation: Open new communication to send mail with CC

methods.name: odoo.addons.helpdesk_ticket_mail_message.models.mail_message.Message.mail_compose_message_action_resend
documentation: Open new communication to reply

methods.name: odoo.addons.helpdesk_ticket_mail_message.models.mail_message.Message.mail_compose_message_action_note
documentation: Open new communication to create a note

Messages model: system notification (replacing res.log notifications),
comments (OpenChatter discussion) and incoming emails.

methods.name: odoo.addons.helpdesk_ticket_mail_message.tests.test_mail_message.TestMailMessage.test_create_email_received
documentation:
Check that a received email message is configured correctly.
Any message created without message_type_mail in the context
will be flagged as email_received in the helpdesk_ticket module.
(model: helpdesk.ticket, res_id: helpdesk.ticket.id)

methods.name: odoo.addons.helpdesk_ticket_mail_message.tests.test_mail_message.TestMailMessage.test_create_email_sent
documentation:
Check that a sent email message is configured correctly.
Only messages with message_type_mail in the context will be
flagged as email_sent in the helpdesk_ticket module.
(model: helpdesk.ticket, res_id: helpdesk.ticket.id)

methods.name: odoo.addons.helpdesk_ticket_mail_message.tests.test_mail_message.TestMailMessage.test_create_email_sent_no_context
documentation:
Check that a sent email message from the default company email
is flagged as email_sent in the helpdesk_ticket module.
(model: helpdesk.ticket, res_id: helpdesk.ticket.id)

methods.name: odoo.addons.helpdesk_ticket_mail_message.tests.test_mail_message.TestMailMessage.test_create_comment
documentation: Check that a comment message is configured correctly.

methods.name: odoo.addons.helpdesk_ticket_mail_message.tests.test_mail_compose_message_wizard.TestMailComposeMessage.test_onchange_template_id_wrapper
documentation: Check that original mail onchange wrapper is not called.

methods.name: odoo.addons.helpdesk_ticket_mail_message.tests.test_mail_compose_message_wizard.TestMailComposeMessage.test_generate_email_for_helpdesk_ticket
documentation: Check that partner_ids is emptied for helpdesk ticket mail composer.
